title: Outlined Ores
description: Gives the ore texture a nice outline to make it more visible! Currently available for 1.20 and up. (Works well on earlier versions)
body:
# OutlinedOres ![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27965fabad6055d07ee09ab122be5a372cb3fd9e.webp) ![Ore Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74a2423d0a231eef5d7a7d9d881ab855e94096c4.png)    ## - Outlined ores for Minecraft 1.20 and up! - ## - (Works well on earlier versions) -
